caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and over-ear headphones. He is topped with a large, spiky, silver-gray wig. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including pieces from the brand "LEE". To his left, a logo displays "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" in red and white text. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a stationary seated position, his expression shifting slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing. The background and equipment remain static throughout the scene, while the "BOSS TALK JOY" logo appears intermittently on the right side of the frame.
